title: Citrusy Crunchy Syrian Couscous Stir-fry
description: A whole30-friendly sick-day Syrian dish featuring citrusy and crunchy elements in a couscous stir-fry that's perfect for those days when you're feeling under the weather.
instructions: Preheat your grill or a pan over medium-high heat.
In a small bowl, mix together lemon juice and olive oil. Set aside.
Heat the remaining olive oil in the prepared pan or on the grill. Add onions and garlic; cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add couscous to the pan and stir for another minute.
Fold in chili flakes, salt, and the lemon-olive oil mixture. Stir well until everything is evenly coated and heated through.
Stir in chopped parsley just before serving.
Serve hot as a lunch dish.
